summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Little Eat Italy pizzeria website. All core functionality working perfectly with excellent graffiti/urban aesthetic implementation.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section (LITTLE EAT ITALY title)
Featured pizzas section displays 4 menu items correctly
Navigation works - all links (HOME, MENU, ABOUT, CONTACT) clickable
Menu page displays with category tabs (ALL, CLASSIC, SPECIAL, VEGETARIAN, DESSERT)
Category filtering works on menu page - tabs switch successfully
About page loads with story content and proper styling
Contact form submits successfully with success toast notification
Backend API /api/menu returns menu items (100% success rate)
Backend API /api/menu/featured returns featured items correctly
Footer marquee animation visible and working
All CTA buttons (VIEW MENU, FIND US, SEE FULL MENU, VISIT US TODAY) functional
Contact form validation and submission working
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all core functionality working)
